title: Syracuse firefighters prevent early morning garage fire from spreading into home
summary: Syracuse Fire Department successfully prevented a garage fire at 453 Durston Ave. on the North Side from spreading into an adjacent residential structure during an early morning response on July 8, 2026. The incident demonstrates operational effectiveness in emergency response and property protection.

political_signal.description: Positive coverage of emergency services effectiveness aligns with public safety priorities and demonstrates departmental operational capability.

processing_notes: Article is incident report, not policy-relevant to CIO operations
